result.stderr:
Daterpillar.Tool 14.1.3-beta+0b7bf5d89f2a18a17480305e197c92ec12c0a6f9
Copyright © 2025 Ackara
USAGE:
create migration script:
  daterpillar generate --old-schema C:\old-schema.xml --language MySQL --output
  C:\V1.0__init.sql --new-schema C:\new-schema.xml

  -f, --old-schema    Required. The path of the old schema file.

  -t, --new-schema    Required. The path of the new schema file.

  -o, --output        Required. The path of the generated migration script.

  -l, --language      Required. The SQL language

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
